scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT DISTINCT
    CAST(FORMAT(fecha, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT)      AS fecha_key,
    fecha,
    DAY(fecha)                                  AS dia_mes,
    MONTH(fecha)                                AS mes,
    DATENAME(MONTH, fecha)                      AS nombre_mes,
    DATEPART(QUARTER, fecha)                    AS trimestre,
    YEAR(fecha)                                 AS anio,
    DATENAME(WEEKDAY, fecha)                    AS nombre_dia,
    CAST(CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, fecha)
         IN (1, 7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BIT)   AS es_fin_semana
FROM (
    SELECT fecha_movimiento AS fecha 
    FROM silver.movimientos_personal
    WHERE fecha_movimiento IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT fecha_inicio AS fecha 
    FROM silver.operaciones
    WHERE fecha_inicio IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT fecha_fin AS fecha 
    FROM silver.operaciones
    WHERE fecha_fin IS NOT NULL
) AS todas_las_fechas',
